name: pirate_ship
description: Age of sail — ships, crews, sea
setting_pool: The deck of a pirate vessel under sail
A smuggler's ship anchored in a cove
A weathered galleon on the open ocean

background_pool.text: The deck of {setting}, tar-stained oak planks stretched between heavy railings, coils of rope and barrels lashed to the mast, rigging creaking overhead under full sail
The waist of {setting}, awash with seawater and spray, deck cargo lashed beneath tarpaulins, iron-swivel guns mounted on the bulwarks, the horizon pitching with the swell
The moonlit anchorage of {setting}, gentle swell at slack tide, lanterns casting amber pools on the wet deck, dark cliffs or jungle visible on the shoreline behind
Below the main deck of {setting}, in the gun battery, rows of iron cannon secured with heavy breeching ropes, lantern light glinting off damp ironwork, the smell of powder and bilge
The high sterncastle of {setting}, draped in signal flags, ornate gilded woodwork beneath peeling paint, the ship's wheel and binnacle commanding a view over the wake

The captain's cabin within {setting}, charts and navigation instruments spread on a table scarred by knife marks, a lantern swinging overhead, the close wood-paneled walls hung with weapons and curiosities
The ship's wheel and binnacle at the stern of {setting}, spokes worn smooth by years of hands, the compass bowl gimbaled in its housing, a narrow view of the wake through taffrail and rigging
The fo'c'sle deck of {setting}, a cramped space between the foremast and the bowsprit, anchor cable coiled in a puddle of seawater, the crew's hammocks and sea chests stowed below
The orlop deck within {setting}, low ceiling and dim lantern light, sail canvas and spare cordage piled between the knees of the hull, the creak of timber and lap of water against the outer planking

A view across the full length of {setting} from bow to stern, deck busy with crew hauling lines and working the sails, the horizon tilting as the ship heels, canvas billowing overhead against a wide sky

subject_pool: a weathered captain in a long coat
a first mate with a scarred jaw
a barefoot sailor with rolled sleeves
a young cabin boy with wide eyes
a hardened gunner with a slow match
a smuggler with a hidden pistol
a cabin boy with bare feet and a tangled mop of hair
a quartermaster with a ledger and a pistol in his belt
a captured officer in a torn navy uniform
a cook with a cleaver and a bloody apron
action_pool: hauling on a rope with braced feet
scanning the horizon through a spyglass
staring down at charts by candlelight
loading a pistol with measured powder
leaning on the rail, watching the sea
coiling a rope with practiced hands
scrubbing the deck on hands and knees
sharpening a cutlass on a whetstone
